periods.name: Today
periods.shortForecast: Patchy Fog then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
periods.detailedForecast: Patchy fog and showers and thunderstorms before 10am, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 72. South southwest wind 6 to 9 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%.

periods.name: Tonight
periods.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms before 1am, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms between 1am and 2am, then a slight chance of showers and thunderstorms between 2am and 3am, then patchy fog between 3am and 5am. Mostly cloudy. Low around 60, with temperatures rising to around 62 overnight. South wind 3 to 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%.

periods.name: Friday
periods.shortForecast: Partly Sunny then Chance Rain Showers
periods.detailedForecast: A chance of rain showers after noon. Partly sunny. High near 77, with temperatures falling to around 74 in the afternoon. South southwest wind 9 to 15 mph, with gusts as high as 26 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%.

periods.name: Friday Night
periods.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers before midnight, then showers and thunderstorms likely. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 61. South wind 12 to 15 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%.
